name_cn:
Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge Bag Latest version with adjustable strap Pale Pear Green
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟
The mini Puzzle can hold a small vertical wallet, most smartphones (up to 6.1 inches), and a sunglasses case; worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable, detachable strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:3000b
